title: SGM-039 Infected family Pandemic with a lascivious virus! ?? A world where the erotica virus with 100% estrus rate is widespread because you want to have sex if you get infected. Mother and daughter are looking for a meat stick as if they were crazy. !! Mari Aoi and Natsuki Yokoyama
description: A pandemic was caused by a virus that suddenly occurred and became a pandemic. Eronavirus is said to infect and develop only in women. Infected women were constantly in estrus and began to seek pleasure wherever they were. If you have sexual intercourse, your estrus will temporarily subside, but you will be in estrus again in a few hours. If infected, the threat of such a terrifying virus that immediately seeks Ji-ko and wets Ma-ko is also in Japan ... What will happen to the cluster family?
maker: グローバルメディアエンタテインメント
